rows.label: qev085901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, Elma-san. Everyone.
Thank you for your help the other day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0002
rows.name: You've worked with Elma's team before?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0003
rows.name: What are you saying? It was when Lao-san wandered off and left us in a bind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ah, that did happen.
My bad, my bad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Alright, Elma. I'll thank you right now.
Eat and drink whatever you'd like before you go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0006
rows.name: Truly mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0007
rows.name:
Tatsu ate and ate mo~~ Such happiness mo~~
Lao-san is a good person mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0008
rows.name: Hey, I said eat whatever you want, but I never said eat as much as you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0009
rows.name: Now, now. Tatsu will treat you next time, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0010
rows.name: By the way, Shingo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0011
rows.name: Wouldn't it be more meaningful to consult these ladies about your troubles, rather than someone like me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0012
rows.name: Are you troubled by something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0013
rows.name: Ah, well, that's...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0014
rows.name: Ah, I know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0014_2
rows.name: Shingo-san, you've found someone you like, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0015
rows.name:
W-W-W-...
How did you figure that out!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0016
rows.name: I mean... Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev085901_SEL0011
rows.name: Smirk and say you can tell just by looking.

rows.label: qev085901_JNK0020
rows.name: Dense

rows.label: qev085901_SEL0021
rows.name: Shake your head and say you had no idea.

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0017
rows.name: Truly. Shingo-san, you're just so easy to read.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0018
rows.name: ...I get told that a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0019
rows.name:
Eh, you really couldn't tell?
Even though Shingo-san is so easy to read.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0020
rows.name: I get told that a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0021
rows.name: Leaving aside how she knew, why don't you hear him out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0022
rows.name: But if it's romantic advice, it'd definitely be better for Lao-san to hear you out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0023
rows.name: You're always on the same team, so he knows you well, Shingo-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0024
rows.name: Besides, Lao-san is married...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0025
rows.name:
My bad, Shingo.
I'm going to head back first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0026
rows.name: Ah, yes, sir.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hope it goes well for you.
I'm rooting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0028
rows.name: T-Thank you very much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0029
rows.name: Talking about his family in front of Lao-san is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0030
rows.name: U-Um, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_JNK0030
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev085901_SEL0031
rows.name: Comfort her with all your might, telling her not to get down about it.

rows.label: qev085901_JNK0040
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev085901_SEL0041
rows.name: Encourage her with all your might, telling her to cheer up.

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Thank you.
I went and said something so insensitive...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Um... I'm sorry.
I can't seem to cheer up...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0033
rows.name:
It's fine.
Lao said he was rooting for Shingo, didn't he?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0034
rows.name:
That is right mo!
If he was angry, he would not have said that mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0035
rows.name: Everyone... Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0036
rows.name: Oh, right. Um, if you don't mind, could you really hear out my troubles?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0037
rows.name: I'm seriously at a loss here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085901_MSG0038
rows.name: Yes, if it's something we can do![ST:wait ]
